model.tiresias.stg_deals.name: stg_deals
model.tiresias.stg_deals.raw_code:
SELECT
  d.deal_id,
  d.deal_pipeline_stage_id,
  s.label AS stage_label,
  d.property_amount,
  d.property_closedate
FROM {{ source('hubspot', 'deal') }} d
JOIN {{ source('hubspot', 'deal_pipeline_stage') }} s
  ON d.deal_pipeline_stage_id = s.stage_id
WHERE s.label = 'Contract Sent'
  AND NOT d._fivetran_deleted
model.tiresias.stg_deals.compiled_code:
SELECT
  d.deal_id,
  d.deal_pipeline_stage_id,
  s.label AS stage_label,
  d.property_amount,
  d.property_closedate
FROM `tiresias-496915`.`hubspot`.`deal` d
JOIN `tiresias-496915`.`hubspot`.`deal_pipeline_stage` s
  ON d.deal_pipeline_stage_id = s.stage_id
WHERE s.label = 'Contract Sent'
  AND NOT d._fivetran_deleted

model.tiresias.fct_pipeline_by_stage.name: fct_pipeline_by_stage
model.tiresias.fct_pipeline_by_stage.raw_code:
SELECT
  stage_name,
  COUNT(*) AS deal_count,
  SUM(property_amount) AS pipeline_value,
  SUM(CASE WHEN property_closedate >= CURRENT_DATE() THEN property_amount ELSE 0 END) AS active_pipeline_value
FROM {{ ref('stg_deals') }}
GROUP BY stage_name
model.tiresias.fct_pipeline_by_stage.compiled_code:
SELECT
  stage_name,
  COUNT(*) AS deal_count,
  SUM(property_amount) AS pipeline_value,
  SUM(CASE WHEN property_closedate >= CURRENT_DATE() THEN property_amount ELSE 0 END) AS active_pipeline_value
FROM `tiresias-496915`.`tiresias_staging`.`stg_deals`
GROUP BY stage_name

exposure.tiresias.late_stage_pipeline_da.name: late_stage_pipeline_dashboard
